results.title: Definition of signal labels
results.description: Signal lines shall have labels defined at subsystem boundaries.

findings.detail: Output signal from port 1 (ControlMomentOut) has no signal label on the line connecting to BrakeTorqueDistribution.

results.title: Display attributes of block names
results.description: Block names shall be descriptive and not use Simulink default names.

findings.detail: Block uses name 'Mux4' which includes a numeric suffix. Rename to reflect function (e.g., BrakeTorqueMux).
Block uses name 'Demux4' which includes a numeric suffix. Rename to reflect function (e.g., BrakeTorqueDemux).

results.title: Design min/max specification of output interfaces
results.description: Root Outport blocks shall have min and max values specified for range checking.

findings.detail: Outport has no design min/max specified. For ASIL D (REQ_SCS_003), output ranges must be explicitly defined.
Outport has no design min/max specified.
Outport has no design min/max specified.
Outport has no design min/max specified.

results.title: Inport interface definition
results.description: Root Inport blocks shall have data type, range, and sample time explicitly specified.

findings.detail: Inport data type is 'Inherit: auto'. Interface specifies range [-15.0, 15.0] but the Inport block does not enforce it.

results.title: Solver options
results.description: Fixed-step solver shall be used for safety-critical models intended for code generation.

results.title: Unconnected signals and blocks
results.description: Model shall not contain unconnected signal lines, input ports, or output ports.
